title: Thai Astrology — Knowledge Acquisition Batch
description: Schema for an acquisition batch consumed by KnowledgeAcquisitionEngine (V6). A batch carries evidence and/or research records to import gradually (JSON only — no Dart editing). Importing NEVER modifies the PlanetRelationshipMatrix; it only merges the evidence (V4) and research (V3) corpora. Evidence records follow evidence.schema.json; research records follow research.schema.json.

batchId.description: Optional id echoed back in the Import Report, e.g. "BATCH-2026-06-28-01".

research.description: Research records (see ../research/research.schema.json). evidenceIds must resolve to an evidence record already in the corpus or earlier in this same batch.
